author: cms-sw
body:
By default `rpmbuild` and `rpmdeps` use all the available cores. This was not a issue when we build on 16 core build nodes but building on large achine with ngt highcore machine with 786 core this can break builds as this can hit other limits ( number of open files, number of processes run by a user etc.). 

This PR proposes to set `_smp_build_nthreads` macro which limits the cores used by `rpmbuild` and clean up the build-system based env from cmsdist as pkgtools should these env. This way pkgtools tag can be used for all release cycles. Setting these variables via cmsdist means only release which has this change can benefit from it but setting via cmsBuild means all release cycle can make use of these
title: Control the number of core used by rpmbuild and rpmdeps
